case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. CARLOTA CHIRINO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHIRINO, CARLOTA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-13-2011
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-14-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
POS; DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE ON DEFT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHIRINO, CARLOTA
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-30-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST D S. CARRUTHERS, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-30-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-15-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-14-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
